title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla Global Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla Global Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla Global Group:
Craftsvilla Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla Global Group!
